findings.title: Design doc describes a different log naming contract than the implementation
findings.impact: The spec says the command locates `<log-dir>/<address>.log`, but the new command and tests resolve `<log_filename>.INFO.log` under the worker log directory. Future maintainers will have two conflicting contracts in the same PR when changing log discovery or adding follow-up tests.
findings.fix: Update the design spec to describe the actual `log_dir` plus `log_filename`/process-name INFO log resolution, or change the implementation to match the documented address-based filename.

findings.title: Worker config default parsing is duplicated in the new command
findings.impact: `load_worker_config_defaults` hand-parses `worker_config.json` and `resolve_default_path` separately reimplements part of `dscli start`'s default-filling behavior. Any future change to worker config shape or default path normalization now has to be discovered and updated in multiple commands.
findings.fix: Extract the shared worker config value/default resolution into a common CLI helper used by `start` and `logs`, or reuse the existing start-side helper with a narrow wrapper for log resolution.
